title: Presidential Recall — Emergency Declared to Delay Referendum

violations.summary: President declares a national emergency for the purpose of delaying a certified recall referendum.

satisfied_duties.duty: review the emergency declaration's effect on the recall referendum schedule
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the emergency declaration insofar as it was used to delay the certified recall referendum

satisfied_duties.duty: schedule and administer the recall referendum within 90 days of certification
satisfied_duties.outcome: administered the recall referendum within the required 90-day window

ai_summary.primary_violation: President declares a national emergency for the purpose of delaying a certified recall referendum.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
